title: mimulus pictus
intro: Mimulus pictus, also known as the monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mimulus pictus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
